descFull: A living AI-agent office on your desktop wallpaper — Claude Code agents that walk, work, delegate, learn & hold meetings. Per-agent swappable models (Claude/GLM/DeepSeek/Qwen/Kimi/OpenAI/Gemini/Groq/Ollama…), workflows, plugins, voice & Telegram/Discord/LINE. Open source.
